inputs.name: DKIM CNAME 1 value
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, go to Settings > Sender Authentication > Domain Authentication, set up your domain, and copy the value for the 's1._domainkey' CNAME record.

inputs.name: DKIM CNAME 2 value
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, go to Settings > Sender Authentication > Domain Authentication, and copy the value for the 's2._domainkey' CNAME record.
